prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9B. Other Information" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 9B's text:
- If the "Item 15" heading is visible on this page, Item 9B ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 9B runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 9B at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
ITEM 14. Principal Accountant Fees and Services

Information concerning accountant fees and services will be contained in our Proxy Statement to be issued in connection with our Annual Meeting of Stockholders scheduled to be held on October 7, 2025 and is incorporated herein by reference.

68
